title: CRIMINAL RECORD EXPUNGEMENT - 211info
text: OREGON JUDICIAL BRANCH CRIMINAL RECORD EXPUNGEMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information on how to file a petition to set aside or seal a conviction, an arrest, citation, charge, or a finding of Guilty Except Insane (GEI). Charges that may be set aside include most violations, misdemeanors, Class C felonies, and those felonies that may be treated as misdemeanors. Most Class A and Class B felony convictions may not be set aside. No type of traffic violation (such as speeding) or traffic crime (such as DUII) can be set aside. Violent felonies, most sex offenses and offenses involving child abuse may not be set aside. Allows some very old but serious drug convictions to be set aside. 1163 State Street Salem, OR 973012563 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website to find information for local circuit courts FEES: Request record form State Police and fingerprint check: $63 Court filing fee: $0 Fee assistance may be available DOCUMENTS: Completed forms LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Criminal Record Expungement Assistance Other Services Offered At This Location: CONSUMER ASSISTANCE AND PROTECTION - CRIMINAL JUSTICE COMPLAINTS COURTS - COURT INFORMATION FINDER INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - PARENT EDUCATION CLASSES LEGAL SERVICES - FAMILY LAW PROGRAM LEGAL SERVICES - NAME CHANGE FORMS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. OREGON JUDICIAL BRANCH
